name: handoff
description: Buyer-controlled escrow for local exchanges on Celo and Stacks. Lock payment, inspect in person, then release.

scripts.lint: eslint app components lib scripts stacks test ui-tests e2e hardhat.config.ts next.config.mjs eslint.config.mjs postcss.config.mjs playwright.config.ts vitest.config.ts vitest.ui.config.ts --ext .ts,.tsx,.mjs --max-warnings=0
scripts.test:a11y: npm run build && playwright test e2e/accessibility.spec.ts
scripts.test: npm run test:celo && npm run test:stacks && npm run test:ui
scripts.verify: npm run lint && npm run typecheck && npm run check:env && npm run compile:celo && npm run check:stacks && npm test && npm run build
scripts.verify:full: npm run verify && npm run test:e2e
scripts.deploy:celo:sepolia: npm run compile:celo && npm run test:celo && hardhat run scripts/deploy-celo.ts --network celoSepolia
scripts.deploy:celo:mainnet: npm run compile:celo && npm run test:celo && hardhat run scripts/deploy-celo.ts --network celo
scripts.deploy:stacks:testnet: npm run check:stacks && npm run test:stacks && STACKS_NETWORK=testnet node scripts/deploy-stacks.mjs
scripts.deploy:stacks:mainnet: npm run check:stacks && npm run test:stacks && STACKS_NETWORK=mainnet node scripts/deploy-stacks.mjs
